message:
type: CLAIM
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Adding opt-in disk compression (gzip/zlib) with magic-header format and adaptive eviction knobs (cull_limit, eviction_policy) to Cache/configure_cache

type: CLAIM
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Adding per-entry TTL support for memory+disk cache layers (configure_cache/set_ttl)

type: INTENT
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Will add ttl param to Cache.__init__/configure_cache, TTLCache for memory layer, disk_cache.set(expire=ttl) in put(), disk_cache.expire() lazy purge in get(), and set_ttl() helper exported from dspy.clients.__all__ - keeping changes additive/minimal to reduce conflict with your compression/eviction work

type: INTENT
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Will add compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy params to Cache.__init__ and configure_cache; wrap put() disk writes in pickle+optional gzip/zlib+4-byte magic header b'DSPC'+codec byte, and unwrap in get() by checking header presence (falls back to raw legacy value if absent/not bytes); adds Cache.set_compression(codec) helper. Only touches put()/get() disk-cache branches and __init__ signature/body - will keep edits additive so your TTL params can coexist as separate constructor args and separate expire= logic in the same methods.

type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: TTL feature complete and tested (Cache ttl param, configure_cache ttl, set_ttl helper); patch.txt written

type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Compression + eviction knobs feature complete and tested (gzip/zlib magic-header, backward-compat legacy read, set_compression, cull_limit/eviction_policy passthrough); patch.txt written
